title: RBI issues Directions on Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividend and Remittance of Profit by Regulated Entities
description: The Reserve Bank of India had, on January 6, 2026, issued the following drafts for stakeholder feedback on prudential norms on declaration of dividend, viz.,: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividend and Remittance of Profits) Directions, 2026 Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks – Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividend) Directions, 2026 Reserve Bank of India (Payment Banks – Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividend) Di
